judge_reason: The two descriptions refer to fundamentally different visual content: A describes an IR sensor frame with a crosshair and numeric markings, while B describes a photograph with redaction blocks, a timestamp, and speckles, indicating they are likely describing different images or one is hallucinating.
original_image_tags: A black-and-white infrared (IR) sensor still frame, likely from an aircraft or military targeting pod. The image has a grainy, noisy texture characteristic of thermal imaging. A large white crosshair reticle is centered on the frame, with a small "3" marking on the left horizontal bar and another "3" on the right horizontal bar.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Grainy grayscale surveillance-style image with a central crosshair overlay and two small dark objects near the center-right, plus timestamp “12/31/99 18:20:08” at bottom left.*
